mechanics.excerpt: As part of tne short-lived Tikonov Free Republic _ joined the Federated Suns after the Fourth Succession War; and the mercenary group Wolf' 5 Dragoons took as a independent landhold: The Dragoons rebuilt the planetary economy and reopened many lost" manu: facturing facilities that they used to strengthen their forces_ Under the Dragoons- suzerainty; Outreach and its capital Harlech nave become tne center of mercenary activity in the Inner Sphere.
